### Echodyne combines patented hardware with powerful software to create unrivaled, next-generation, commercial MESA® radar systems.

items.notes: EchoFlight® is explicitly an airborne FMCW radar for UAS platforms; full radar portfolio serves as sensors for detecting/tracking targets in airspace
UAS/AAM section explicitly offers ground station radar for comprehensive airspace management, including DFR, Ground Stations, and ADLS
Defense ISR application is listed; radar systems used as ISR sensor payloads in defense missions

products_categories.notes: Primary UXV relevance is EchoFlight airborne radar for drone platforms and ground station radar for airspace management; counter-UAS radar is the dominant revenue driver but serves as ground detection infrastructure

value.address: 12112 115th Ave NE, Suite A, Kirkland, WA 98034

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells named radar subsystems (EchoShield, EchoGuard, EchoFlight) to Systems Suppliers, Integrators, and End Users. Does not manufacture complete UAS platforms.

items.name: EchoShield®
items.product_type: medium-range pulse-Doppler ESA radar (fixed, temporary, OTM)

items.name: EchoGuard®
items.product_type: short-range FMCW ESA radar (fixed, portable, temporary)

items.name: EchoFlight®
items.product_type: short-range FMCW airborne radar for UAS

tagline: Kirkland-based supplier of metamaterials electronically scanned array (MESA) radar systems—EchoShield (medium-range pulse-Doppler), EchoGuard (short-range FMCW), EchoFlight (airborne FMCW), and EchoWare software—for defense, government, critical infrastructure, and UAS/AAM markets. Production-ready and fielded across 40+ countries via integrators and primes. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not disclosed in public sources.
